summary: iOS 👀 FALCON | DFU - App incorrectly shows device upto date after failure
scenario: After a DFU failure, the app incorrectly shows the headset as up-to-date and prevents further updates
description_clean: After a DFU (Device Firmware Update) failure for the headset, the app incorrectly displays the device as up-to-date. The headset was not actually updated, but the main SW update section shows both Falcon headset and Charge Stand as successfully updated to the latest build. Subsequent attempts to update show "update unavailable."
steps: Initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) for the headset.
Allow the DFU process to fail (e.g., due to connection loss, power interruption, or timeout).
Observe the main SW update section in the app.
Check the displayed status for both Falcon headset and Charge Stand.
Attempt to perform another update for the headset.
expected: The app should indicate that the DFU failed and that the headset is not up-to-date. The main SW update section should show the headset and Charge Stand with their actual firmware versions, not as successfully updated. Subsequent update attempts should be available.
actual: The app incorrectly displays the device as up-to-date. The main SW update section shows both Falcon headset and Charge Stand as successfully updated to the latest build. Subsequent attempts to update show "update unavailable."
